query:
INSERT INTO uploaded_video_notes
SET
  token = ?,
  uploaded_video_token = ?,
  maybe_filename = ?,
  maybe_reported_model_type = ?,
  maybe_reported_model_name = ?,
  maybe_website = ?,
  maybe_other_website = ?,
  maybe_comments = ?,
  maybe_email_address = ?,
  can_share_report = ?,
  was_scammed = ?,
  comment_create_ip_address = ?,
  created_at = NOW()
